patch_name: Patch F: Mobile Controls & In-Game Hints
description: Introduced an optional on-screen control overlay for mobile users to play the 2D game without a keyboard. Added an in-game hint overlay for new players.
test_plan: Access game-2d.html on a mobile device or via browser developer tools' mobile emulation. Verify the on-screen controls appear and are interactive (tap left/right moves the player, tap jump jumps). Verify the keyboard controls continue to function on desktop.
